actions.name: Sting
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

tactical_info.positioning: Uses small size to avoid detection and retaliation
tactical_info.damage_output: 4 total damage (1 piercing + 3 poison) per hit
tactical_info.key_abilities: Poison damage that bypasses armor, blindsight detection
tactical_info.synergies: Dangerous in groups or as environmental hazards
